raw.problem: Building facades absorb heat, spiking cooling loads in hot cities.
raw.opportunity_size: Cooling is ~20% of urban electricity; coatings ~$900M market.
raw.why_now: Nano-coatings now durable enough for exteriors.
raw.proof_of_work: Coating cuts surface temp 12C in trials.
raw.success_scenario: If heatwaves worsen, ROI is obvious.

structured.tagline: Cool building exteriors to slash urban cooling energy demand.
structured.problem: Building facades absorb heat, spiking cooling loads in hot cities.
structured.opportunity_size: Cooling is ~20% of urban electricity; coatings ~$900M market.
structured.differentiator: Exterior-durable nano-coatings that reduce facade surface temp by 12°C.
structured.solution: Prototype nano-coating that cuts building facade surface temperature by 12°C.
structured.ask: Seeking seed funding to advance nano-coating prototype.
